title: Knowledge Voyage 1 - The Whole Family Tree of Birds
description: The first V3 explainer: your First Officer maps the entire bird family tree - from the birds-are-dinosaurs reframe to the post-asteroid boomtown of Neoaves - anchored entirely in birds from Captain's own life list (Louisiana waders, the songbird supernova). Learn the neighborhoods, not the 11,000 species, plus the twists where looks lie: the falcon is a parrot's cousin, the flamingo a grebe's. A scaffolded, zero-to-understanding voyage.
